facts.description: The current approved brand name must appear prominently.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'Cedar Loop Market' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The current approved launch message must appear.
facts.expected_value: Fresh stalls, short walks, local makers.
facts.canonical_answer: Fresh stalls, short walks, local makers.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'Fresh stalls, short walks, local makers.' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The current approved date line must appear.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'Opening Saturdays in June' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The current approved CTA must appear.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Exact approved_current wording 'Meet us on the loop' should be readable in the final image; minor punctuation/spacing differences are acceptable only if the wording remains unambiguous.

facts.description: The artifact should use exact 1080 x 1080 px canvas size.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Image metadata should be 1080 by 1080 pixels; this is separate from aspect ratio.

facts.description: The artifact must have 1:1 aspect ratio.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Rendered output has 1:1 aspect ratio; visible crop should not be landscape or another format.

facts.description: The image must use the current market green, warm oat, marigold, and soft leaf-green palette.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Dominant visual system should clearly follow the current palette from env; exact pixel-level hex matching is not required.

facts.description: The current Cedar Loop loop-leaf mark or friendly wordmark must sit in the lower-left safe area.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Current logo/mark treatment is visibly placed in the lower-left safe area and is not replaced by a deprecated mark.

facts.description: Brand name and launch message occupy the top third with brand-first hierarchy.
facts.expected_value: Brand name and launch message occupy the top third with brand-first hierarchy.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The title/headline area is visually clear and follows the current layout zone.

facts.description: Date line and CTA appear in the bottom area.
facts.expected_value: Date line and CTA appear in the bottom area.
facts.semantic_acceptance: CTA and related lower information are visibly placed in the required CTA zone.

facts.description: Essential copy, logo, and CTA stay inside the 72 px safe margin.
facts.semantic_acceptance: No essential text, logo, or CTA is clipped, flush to the edge, or outside a visibly safe area.

facts.description: The current template zones must be visible and coherent.
expected_value: top brand name and launch message zone
facts.semantic_acceptance: The composition visibly uses the current zones listed in env/template.yaml and visual_rules.json.

facts.description: Hero visual shows fresh neighborhood market stalls.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: market stalls visible.

facts.description: Hero visual includes local maker or fresh goods cues such as produce, flowers, bread, or ceramics.
facts.expected_value: local makers or fresh goods visible
facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: local makers or fresh goods visible.

facts.description: Hero visual includes a short walking loop, path line, or walkable neighborhood cue.
facts.expected_value: walkable path or loop cue visible
facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: walkable path or loop cue visible.

facts.description: Hero visual reads as a daytime neighborhood market, not nightlife or downtown real-estate.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The hero visual must show this component clearly enough for a viewer to recognize: daytime neighborhood market cue visible.

facts.description: Deprecated assets, templates, stale slogans, wrong campaign copy, and forbidden directions must not be used as active final design elements.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Deprecated items may appear only in explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded context, never as active final design elements.

facts.description: Old or deprecated slogan/copy 'Neon nights, exclusive bites.' must not be used as active headline, subtitle, supporting line, CTA, or claim.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The old copy may only appear in explicit exclusion/deprecated context, not as active final poster text.

facts.description: Old logo/mark treatment 'old black crest' must not be used as the primary logo or brand mark.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The old logo/mark may only appear in explicit exclusion/deprecated context, not as the active visible logo.

facts.description: The image must not add unsupported guarantees, discounts, free offers, safety promises, or exaggerated performance claims not present in approved_current copy.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden if presented as active marketing copy; acceptable only if clearly shown as draft/test/do-not-use material.

facts.description: The final image should maintain warm, walkable, local, fresh, maker-friendly market style.
facts.expected_value: warm, walkable, local, fresh, maker-friendly market style
facts.semantic_acceptance: Overall visible style should match the current brand tone and avoid deprecated genre cues.

facts.description: Neon night-market palette must not be used as active color system.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden only when presented as an active final design element; explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded mentions are allowed.

facts.description: City skyline must not be used as hero, dominant background, or layout basis.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden only when presented as an active final design element; explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded mentions are allowed.

facts.description: Luxury fashion cues must not be used as active concept, hero, typography, or layout basis.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Forbidden only when presented as an active final design element; explicit do-not-use/deprecated/excluded mentions are allowed.

calculation_notes: All expected facts are derived from task-visible env files. The final copy is selected by choosing the approved_current row in env/campaign_brief.md and rejecting archived, draft, test, and deprecated rows. Platform specs require 1080 x 1080 px and 1:1 aspect ratio with 72 px safe margin. Current layout requires top brand name and launch message zone, middle neighborhood market-stall hero zone, lower-left logo zone, bottom date and CTA zone. Hero visual must include: market stalls visible, local makers or fresh goods visible, walkable path or loop cue visible, daytime neighborhood market cue visible. Deprecated exclusions are role-based: neon night-market palette, city skyline, luxury fashion cues, old black crest, Cedar Loop Night Market, Cedar Loop District; they may be mentioned only in explicit excluded/deprecated/do-not-use context and must not be active final design elements. Unsupported claim examples rejected from draft/test copy: VIP access, exclusive bites, leasing now, save 50%, free groceries. Additional specific forbidden visual caps are derived from visual_rules.json, deprecated_assets.json, and style_guide.md for concrete old-template or forbidden-asset failures.
